name: Battle Royal Mode - Joining
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂａｔｔｌｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バトル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒｏｙａｌ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ロイヤル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍｏｄｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>モード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｊｏｉｎｉｎｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジョイニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate this card by targeting 1 Effect Monster on the field. The first two times that monster would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. When it is destroyed by battle, the player that destroyed it gains 2000 LP. If the turn player's opponent takes battle or effect damage: Activate this effect; that opponent can apply the following effect.
● Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your hand or Deck, but lose 2000 LP.
eff:
Activate this card by targeting 1 Effect Monster on the field. The first two times that monster would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. When it is destroyed by battle, the player that destroyed it gains 2000 LP. If the turn player's opponent takes battle or effect damage: Activate this effect; that opponent can apply the following effect.
● Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your hand or Deck, but lose 2000 LP.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's field
